case_title: FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING VS. KAI F WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JAMES MACLEOD RE VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 62165977) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR COURT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100044069) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KAI F AN INDIVIDUAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, KAI F AN INDIVIDUAL $8,284.63 PRINCIPAL, $408.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,693.38, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62639857), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION SERVED JUL-24-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-24-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KAI F AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 62796730) AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KAI F AN INDIVIDUAL
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KAI F AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100044069) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2018 CONTINUED TO MAY-21-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $408.75 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100044069) AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KAI F AN INDIVIDUAL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KAI F AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-2018
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF CASE MANAGEMENT ORDER (TRANSACTION ID # 62765458) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON CONTINUED OSC (TRANSACTION ID # 62881421) FILED BY PETITIONER FIST NATIONAL BANK OF OMAHA, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
